arts.ttl: Aston Villa v Liverpool - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates as Arne Slot's men bid to move TEN points clear at Premier League summit
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog of Aston Villa vs Liverpool as the Reds bid to move ten points clear at the top of the Premier League as they travel to Villa Park.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa v Liverpool: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Premier League updates from the 7.30pm GMT kick-off Live scores | Top scorers | Football Daily | Email Will What a lovely bit of midweek Premier League frivolity we have ahead of us. There might be some Champions League action going on but if you BACK BRITAIN, then Villa Park is the place for you. Stumbling Aston Villa, who sit ninth, are playing host to table-topplers Liverpool in a game rearranged as Arne Slot is off to Wembley in a few weeks for the Carabao Cup final. Villa only managed a draw with 10-man Ipswich at the weekend and have looked off colour for quite a long time, something that can be blamed on their ill-judged decision to qualify for the Champions League. It might not be continental action but these feels like a significant night for the two teams. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Journalist insists Liverpool still want player – Arne Slot wants him at Anfield
arts.sum: Arne Slot wants to sign Feyenoord defender David Hancko, who could be the long-term successor to Virgil van Dijk at Liverpool. That’s according to journalist Süleyman Öztürk, who is full of praise for the defender today in comments relayed by FR 12. Hancko has a growing reputation in Europe after impressing for the Dutch side The post Journalist insists Liverpool still want player – Arne Slot wants him at Anfield appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher told he's wrong as Liverpool squad player hailed as 'reason they're top'
arts.sum: Jamie Carragher has been put in his place after slamming the standard of goalkeeping in the Premier League, with Liverpool's own second-choice stopper a shining example of why he's wrong

arts.ttl: FSG will be 'secretly delighted' as Liverpool using Barcelona as 'Trojan horse' in £266m masterplan
Marcus Rashford behaviour speaks volumes as Man Utd 'mistake' verdict questioned
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has shown signs of what he can do since joining Aston Villa on loan from Man Utd - but a former player believes it's too early to start making snap judgements A former Manchester United player has warned it's too early to say whether letting Marcus Rashford leave for Aston Villa was a mistake by the Old Trafford club.

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Reds eyeing three La Liga stars for summer window?
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly considering three La Liga stars as potential targets for the summer transfer window, including Real Sociedad winger Take Kubo.

arts.ttl: Player admits Chelsea wanted him but now he’s watching Liverpool with interest instead
arts.sum: Feyenoord star Quilindschy Hartman has confirmed Chelsea wanted him at one point, but now he is firmly focused on Liverpool. Voetbal Primeur cover comments from the defender today made in an interview with Voetbal International, in which he admits his eyes are firmly on the Premier League. The 23-year-old has been linked with a move The post Player admits Chelsea wanted him but now he’s watching Liverpool with interest instead appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Zubimendi HIJACK? Arsenal update as Real Madrid, Liverpool stance revealed
arts.sum: There is no risk of Liverpool or Real Madrid hijacking Arsenal's deal to sign Martin Zubimendi as things stand, according to a report. Zubimendi has a closer attachment to his team than most modern footballers and he rejected Liverpool last summer despite the fact that even Real Sociedad had seemingly accepted that he would likely leave.

arts.sum: The latest Liverpool news about how to watch the Reds play Aston Villa in their Premier League match at Villa Park
